# Workflow Reverse Real Fixtures

These fixtures are copied from existing repository examples and local Runner-generated workflow artifacts on 2026-05-20.
They are used to verify Workflow reverse generation with real workflow shapes instead of synthetic happy-path YAML.

- `pg_restore.yaml`: copied from `pkg/runner/examples/pg-restore.yaml`.
- `self_healing_kubelet.yaml`: copied from `pkg/runner/examples/self-healing-kubelet.yaml`.
- `builtin_probes.yaml`: copied from `pkg/runner/examples/builtin-probes.yaml`.
- `http_chatops_ticket.yaml`: copied from `pkg/runner/examples/http-chatops-ticket.yaml`.
- `shell_run_minimal.yaml`: copied from `pkg/runner/examples/shell-run.yaml`.
- `redis_memory_dry_run.yaml`: copied from `.data/runner/workflows/runner_candidate_candidate_pack_1778718004043520000_redis_dry_run.yaml`.
